item: Wants LSP for VS Code preparation steps
source_text: check is my typescript lsp is working?
note: First message in session, no preceding assistant

item: Wants copy project, fill env, run one command
source_text:
nginx looks normal. pay attention that on the machine we will havw nginx and docker only. Also static files in docker should be in volumes, we shouldn't lose our db \ uploads after images updated
also we need scripts to start the system. I want to copy this project, fill env and run one command. Everything sghould work out of the box - build , start docker (no registry)
preceding_assistant: Presented Docker and nginx design section with docker-compose.yml layout and nginx configs

item: Should update work with large files
source_text:
let's upgrade 2 things
1) we should update work with large files. We should not wait s3 file save when we call POST complete. Instead of on the frontend we should poll state and diplay progress of s3 uploading if possible (if no just poll and show wait)
2) we need to save large files locally and we should have dedicated frontend page where we will show list of non images file and ler user download them from s3 or locally
note: Session resume, first message after SessionStart hook at line 488

item: Should have toggle for sync upload option
source_text: let's update single select also. We should have an option anf toggler on the frontend for this option: sync upload (where we call REST API and in the same thread uploads file to s3) and async, where we upload file and polling it's uploading state
note: Session resume, first message after SessionStart hook at line 570

item: Analyze both Patreon and Nebula for competitive research
source_text:
1) let's have both - Patreon and Nebula
2) we no need streams, text content is required, donations later
3) ignore all focuments from 00 i didn't mention, they can be outdated
preceding_assistant: Asked 3 questions: which 5th platform for market research (Patreon suggestion), live-streaming/articles scope, and how existing docs in 00-initial-docs relate to this work

item: Free-form text badge for users (not enum)
source_text: A) Free-form text badge for now
preceding_assistant: Invoked brainstorming skill and asked about badge type: A) Free-form text, B) Enum/predefined, C) Something else

item: 50 char max, limit in DB layer, no extra code check
source_text:
A) 50 characters max
limit in DB layer, no need extra check in code
preceding_assistant: Presented database schema design section and asked about character length limit and badge visibility (public vs private)

item: Use null | string for nullable fields, not undefined
source_text: badge: undefined - no need. null or string
preceding_assistant: Presented GraphQL API design section showing UpdateUserBadgeInput with badge?: string (using undefined for removal)

item: Specify TypeORM column type explicitly for nullable union types
source_text:
DataTypeNotSupportedError: Data type "Object" in "UserEntity.badge" is not supported by "postgres" database.
we need to specify type for entity if we are using  | null
note: Session resume at line 212; user reported runtime error and stated the fix rule

item: Author is a user with specific role in backend
source_text: we already have a platform where one author can create his publications in his own author pannel, publication contains description and 2 videos - preview and original one. We also going to work with authors with rich text content (articles). Each publication can have list of subscriptions. user with any subscription from this list can view full publication.
note: First user message in session (line 4); the UserEntity code confirms UserRole enum with AUTHOR role

Not found as direct user message. Appears in assistant-generated task definition doc (line 14) as assumption #3: 'Subscription tiers are configured by platform admins on behalf of authors (per stakeholder Q&A: Paid subscriptions are configured by admin at author request)'. The source is a stakeholder Q&A referenced by the assistant, not a user message in the transcript.

Not found as direct user message. Appears in assistant-generated task definition doc (line 14) in functional area #10: 'Admin: Subscription Management - Configure subscription tiers per author, collective subscriptions'. The term 'collective subscriptions' was synthesized by the assistant from stakeholder Q&A docs, not stated by user in transcript.

item: Platform has video publications with preview + original
source_text: we already have a platform where one author can create his publications in his own author pannel, publication contains description and 2 videos - preview and original one.

item: TypeORM: set null explicitly for nullable field updates
source_text: badge: undefined - no need. null or string
preceding_assistant: Presented GraphQL API design section showing UpdateUserBadgeInput with badge?: string (using undefined for removal)
note: Same message as item 9. The lesson is that nullable fields should use explicit null, not undefined, for TypeORM updates

item: GraphQL: nullable optional DTO fields need explicit @Field type
source_text:
now gql part
UndefinedTypeError: Undefined type error. Make sure you are providing an explicit type for the "badge" of the "UserDto" class.
preceding_assistant: Applied TypeORM fix with explicit type: 'varchar' for badge column; said server should start without errors
